gist.headline: Paper planes and pixels
gist.blurb: A new Telegram bot has landed in the showcase. jdunyara brings chat and image generation to your favorite messenger.
gist.summary: Added jdunyara, a Telegram AI bot for chat and image generation, to the Social_Bots showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now access AI chat and image generation features through this new Telegram integration.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee interacting with a paper plane (Telegram symbol). The plane is flying through a sky of pixelated chat bubbles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot riding a large paper plane through a sky filled with soft pixel clouds and chat bubbles. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm and adventurous.
